_comment: BOOTSTRAP CONFIG. Only 'Api' and 'Database' are required to start - everything else is configured in the console (Settings, stored in SQL) once the database is connected. The first-run wizard writes the Database block for you; you normally never edit this by hand.
_database_comment: Filled in by the first-run wizard (Settings -> Database). This is the ONE thing that can't live in SQL - the API needs it to reach SQL in the first place. Leave Server/Name blank to start the API in SETUP MODE.
_managed_in_gui_comment: The keys below are OPTIONAL fallbacks only. The live values are managed in the console (Settings) and stored in SQL: directory/LDAP, sign-in domains, MFA & SSO toggles, AD Connect server, Certificate Authority config string, role mappings and secrets. They are seeded on first DB creation and editable in the GUI thereafter.
